hero.title: Admissions
hero.subtitle: Begin your child's journey at Dolphin Kids. We'd love to welcome your family.

steps.title: Enquiry
steps.description: Fill out the online enquiry form or call our admissions desk.

steps.title: Campus Visit
steps.description: Schedule a guided tour to experience our campus and meet our team.

steps.title: Application
steps.description: Submit the application form with required documents.

steps.title: Interaction
steps.description: A friendly interaction session for the child and parents.

steps.title: Confirmation
steps.description: Receive your offer letter and complete the enrolment.

faq.question: What age groups do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept children from age 3 (Pre-K) through Grade 8 (age 13).

faq.question: What is the fee structure?
faq.answer: Fee details are shared during the campus visit. Please contact our admissions team for the latest schedule.

faq.question: Is transportation available?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer GPS-tracked school buses covering all major areas of Bangalore.

faq.question: What documents are required?
faq.answer: Birth certificate, previous school records (if applicable), passport-size photos, and address proof.

faq.question: Do you accept mid-year admissions?
faq.answer: Subject to availability, we do accept mid-year transfers. Please contact admissions for current openings.
